Tryon's Neighborhood Beer, Wine & Cigar Shop

Explore the Selection Hours & Location
Scroll
Welcome to The Tryon Bottle

Your Local
Bottle Shop

Tucked into the heart of downtown Tryon, NC, The Tryon Bottle is a one-of-a-kind neighborhood shop built for curious drinkers and casual explorers alike. Whether you're a local regular or just passing through on Trade Street, you'll always find something worth taking home, OR a welcoming place to enjoy it.

We carry over 400 beers, always cold, spanning domestic favorites to rare imports from around the world. Our wine selection covers the globe by region. And our cigar case speaks for itself.

400+
Beers in Stock
600+
Wines
1
Great Town
Always Cold

Beer for Every Taste

Over 400 beers spanning every style and origin, from your go-to six-pack to something you've never heard of. All cold, all the time.

Domestic
American Classics
Craft
Local & Independent
European
Imports & World Beers
Ciders & GF
Gluten-Free Options
Cold Cases
Ready to Grab & Go
From Around the World

Wine for Every Occasion

Our wine selection spans the globe, organized by region so you can find exactly what you're looking for, or stumble onto something new. French Burgundies, Italian reds, Spanish Cabs, crisp whites, sweet sips, and more.

France
Italy & Spain
Cabernet
Pinot Noir
Sauv Blanc, Chard & Blends
Sweet
Organic
Sake, Mead & More
400+
Beers Always Cold
600+
Wines
Premium
Cigar Selection
Premium Selection

The Cigar Case

Step up to our humidor and discover a handpicked selection of premium cigars. Whether you're a seasoned aficionado or lighting up for the first time, we have the right smoke at the right price, and a cold beer or glass of wine to go with it.

  • Cohiba, Romeo y Julieta, Montecristo & more
  • Singles, packs, and full boxes available
  • Options at every price point
  • Pair with a cold beer or wine glass on-site
More Than a Shop

Come In.
Stay a While.

The Tryon Bottle isn't just a place to grab a bottle and go. Pull up a seat, pour a glass, and take your time. We've got frozen drinks, a welcoming atmosphere, and a community that makes this feel like more than just a store.

Our outdoor patio on Trade Street is the perfect spot to relax and enjoy downtown Tryon, rain or shine.

See Our Hours
Also at Our Location

Latin Street Food
Done Right.

Della Street Tacos is Latin street food done right… made from scratch, served with soul, and rooted in four generations of family recipes. We slow-roast our meats, hand craft every sauce, and put real care into everything that hits your plate. Whether you're in the mood for one of our signature Smash Tacos, a loaded Burrito, a Rice and Bean Bowl, Smothered Nachos, or a light Salad Wrap, there's something here for everyone. We also offer seasonal soups and rotating specials, so there's always a reason to come back. Pull up a stool, order your food, grab a drink, and stay a while. This is the kind of meal worth slowing down for.
